default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, strategy, and AI-driven optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance trending upward; listicles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Prompt tracking reveals opportunities for new content and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Focus on freshness, structure, and authority for AI/LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Exploring GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and programmatic SEO as potential thought leadership topics](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Upward trend in content performance continues](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Top-performing content: listicles (e.g., "Top 10 websites", "Best data security tools")](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Refreshed integration pages showing early signs of improvement](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [9 articles from last week loaded into CMS; 10 more planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Adding "how to build" use case articles; prioritizing based on goals](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Prompt Tracking and AI Optimization

  - [\~300 prompts loaded across Perplexity, ChatGPT, and AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/tBjTG9XQccLxUN4xXkkofFi58dWmzX1N?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
